## Document Affected

Which document or section requires improvement?

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] ETHICS.md
- [ ] GOVERNANCE.md
- [ ] SECURITY.md
- [ ] CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] ATTRIBUTION.md
- [ ] FINAL_INTENT.md

**Section/Line reference:** 

## Type of Improvement

- [ ] Factual correction
- [ ] Clarity or readability improvement
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Bilingual / translation update (EN ↔ MY)
- [ ] Structural or formatting issue
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Other: _______________

## Current State

Describe the current state of the documentation and what is problematic or missing.

## Proposed Improvement

Describe what the improved content should say or look like.

## Reason

Why is this improvement important? How does it benefit readers or users of the framework?

## Ethical Alignment

How does this improvement align with Ethical AI MY principles?

- [ ] Transparency – Improves clarity and understanding
- [ ] Accountability – Strengthens documentation of responsibilities
- [ ] Fairness – Ensures equitable representation
- [ ] Other: _______________

## Code of Conduct

- [ ] I have read and agree to follow the Code of Conduct
- [ ] I am making this suggestion respectfully and constructively

Thank you for helping improve the Ethical AI MY documentation!
